name: Thai Tomyum Gung (Shrimp) / Gai (Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 tbsp Thai chili paste (with soya beans oil, dark redish-brown color)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 1.5qt saucepan and add water (half of the pot).
2. Add lemon grass and chili paste.
3. Add shrimps and mushrooms. Let it boil for 10 minutes.
4. Add lime leaves and sliced chili peppers. Cook for an additional 1 minute.
5. Mix in a serving bowl with lemon juice and fish sauce to taste.
6. Garnish with cilantro and serve hot with Thai Jasmine rice.
